creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, Dec 9, 2012 at 2:08 AM, Garrett Cooper <yaneurabeya@gmail.com> wrote:
> On Dec 9, 2012, at 2:04 AM, Baptiste Daroussin wrote:
>
>> I can't reproduce, looks strange to me.
>
> May or may not be bmake's fault; I'm using CURRENT with a modified ports tree (:U/:L -> :tu/:tl) and with minor ports modifications, but no major changes in the infrastructure area.

    bapt@ pointed me to this commit on github:
https://github.com/jrmarino/DPorts/commit/6c4e33ddfebc9645b63e3296e7a03f118cf77e10
which will hopefully fix the more generic issue.
Thanks,
-Garrett
